locations.name: 玻利維亞
locations.summary: 玻利維亞多民族國（西班牙語：Estado Plurinacional de Bolivia），通稱玻利維亞，是位於南美洲中西部的內陸國家，與巴西、秘魯、智利、阿根廷、巴拉圭五國接壤，亦為南美洲國家聯盟的成員國；其法定首都為蘇克雷，但實際上…

relations.subject: Royal cinclodes
relations.evidence: The royal cinclodes (Cinclodes aricomae) is an Endangered passerine bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Bolivia and Peru.Remsen, J

relations.subject: Royal cinclodes
relations.evidence: It is primarily threatened by habitat degradation caused by deforestation and overgrazing associated with agriculture. It occurs in three nominally protected areas that nevertheless "are vulnerable to grazing and burning". Climate change may also pose a threat.Sekercioglu, C.H., Schneider, S.H., Fay, J.P
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
